ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the transaction occurred */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of expense */,
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area of expense */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_number" TEXT /* Transaction number for reference */,
  "payment_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the transaction */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "budget_code" TEXT /* Unique budget code for the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the entity belongs to */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the entity */,
  "budget_code" TEXT /* Unique budget code for the entity */,
  "head_of_entity" TEXT /* Name of the head of the entity */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "parent_expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent expense type for hierarchical categorization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_types_parent_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_areas" (
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense area */,
  "expense_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense area */,
  "parent_expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent expense area for hierarchical categorization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense area is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_areas_parent_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is currently active */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the supplier record */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the supplier record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the supplier record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the supplier record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., department head, auditor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., invoice, receipt, contract) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_version" INTEGER /* Version of the document */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is the latest version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_documents_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the history entry is the latest version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_histories_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_histories_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense area */,
  "budget_year" TEXT /* Budget year */,
  "allocated_amount" TEXT /* Allocated amount for the budget year */,
  "actual_spent" TEXT /* Actual amount spent */,
  "remaining_budget" TEXT /* Remaining budget */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget entry is currently active */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the budget entry */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the budget entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the budget entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the budget entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the permission is assigned to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is currently active */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the permission entry */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who last updated the permission entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
